description.overview: South Korea's national dog, the Jindo is fiercely loyal to their family. They're independent thinkers with strong prey drive and deep bonds with their owners.
description.history: The Korean Jindo originated in South Korea.
description.temperament: Known for being loyal, intelligent, bold.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their dense double coat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: South Korea's national dog, the Jindo is fiercely loyal to their family. They're independent thinkers with strong prey drive and deep bonds with their owners.
